**Rationale:**

**Observation Accuracy: accurate**
The Observations section correctly describes the working capabilities: varint encoding/decoding, deckstring parsing/writing, tri-sort optimization, hero/card/sideboard support, version checking, format validation, and the Deck class wrapper. All described capabilities match the actual system functionality.
